allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== User ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'User'\); Write-Output "=== Machine ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'Machine'\); Write-Output "=== Session ==="; $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== SESSION ==="; Write-Output "AUTH_TOKEN: '$env:ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN'"; Write-Output "API_KEY: '$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'"; Write-Output "BASE_URL: '$env:ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL'"; Write-Output "`n=== USER SCOPE ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN', 'User'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'User'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL', 'User'\); Write-Output "`n=== MACHINE SCOPE ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN', 'Machine'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY', 'Machine'\); [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL', 'Machine'\))
